argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const text = '{{ text }}'; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); const textarea = document.querySelector('[data-testid="tweetTextarea_0"]'); if (!textarea) return { ok: false, message: 'Composer textarea not found' }; textarea.focus(); try { document.execCommand('insertText', false, text); } catch { const nativeSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value')?.set; if (nativeSetter) nativeSetter.call(textarea, text); else textarea.value = text; textarea.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const tweetBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="tweetButton"]') || document.querySelector('[data-testid="tweetButtonInline"]'); if (!tweetBtn) return { ok: false, message: 'Tweet button not found' }; tweetBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const toast = document.querySelector('[data-testid="toast"]'); const success = !toast || !toast.textContent?.includes('error'); return { ok: success, message: success ? 'Quote posted' : 'Post may have failed', text }; }
async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ ok: false, message: intermediate.error, text: '' }]; return [intermediate]; }
